# 🚀 LiteLLM Connector for Copilot — v2.1.0

## ⚠️ Important: Configuration Has Changed

**This release removes the old workspace-settings configuration (`litellm-connector.baseUrl`, `backends`, `apiKey`).** All connection details are now managed through VS Code's built-in **Language Models provider-group UI**.

**On first launch after upgrading**, a migration notification will guide you through re-entering your backends in the new format. If you dismiss it or need to redo it:

1. Open Command Palette → **`LiteLLM: Manage Configuration`**
2. Add a provider group for each backend (name, Base URL, API key)
3. Run **`LiteLLM: Reload Models`** to verify

If things go sideways: **`LiteLLM: Reset All Configuration`** clears all state so you can start fresh.

---

## 💥 Breaking Changes

- **Removed** `litellm-connector.baseUrl`, `litellm-connector.backends`, and `litellm-connector.apiKeySecretRef` workspace settings
- **Removed** `litellm-connector.checkConnection` command — use `LiteLLM: Reload Models` to verify discovery
- **Git commit generation** and **inline completions** now require explicit model configuration via `litellm-connector.commitModelIdOverride` (no longer auto-detect)

---

## ✨ New Features

- 🔄 **Automatic Legacy Config Migration** — detects old workspace settings on activation and offers a guided one-time migration to the new provider-group format
- 🔒 **Per-Group Isolation** — each provider group has fully isolated model discovery state; multiple backends no longer share state
- 🧩 **Model Override Master Toggle** — `litellm-connector.enableModelOverrides` lets you disable all override rules and rely purely on LiteLLM `/model/info` responses
- 🛠️ **Tool Name Sanitization for Bedrock** — auto-sanitizes tool names for Bedrock-compatible providers that reject special characters
- 🔧 **Tool Call ID Normalization** — IDs normalized to ≤40 characters for strict providers (GPT-5 / o-series) — closes #83
- 🖼️ **Image & PDF Token Estimation** — token budget now accounts for image and PDF data parts — closes #76
- 🛡️ **Discovery Backoff** — exponential backoff on repeated discovery failures prevents hammering a down proxy
- 📊 **Enriched Token Reporting** — input, output, and reserved output budgets all reported in telemetry and usage tooltips

---

## 🛠️ Refactors & Fixes

- **BackendRegistry owns discovery** — `ModelDiscovery` merged into `LiteLLMProviderRegistry`; single public ingress (`discoverModels`) with internal-write contract
- **Provider base split** — discovery, request, and transport separated into focused service layers under `src/providers/base/`
- **Unified stream interpreter** — `/responses` endpoint stream handling consolidated into `LiteLLMStreamInterpreter` (shared by all providers)
- **Streaming abort fixed** — requests now correctly abort on cancellation or inactivity timeout
- **Reasoning effort preserved** — selected reasoning effort no longer resets on model discovery refresh
- **Sparse tool capability detection fixed** — models with partial tool-capability signals now detected correctly
- **Provider group names from base URLs** — group labels derived from base URL when no explicit name is provided
- **TypeScript strict typing** — broad `any` elimination pass across adapters, config, providers, and tests

---

## 🧪 Test Coverage

- Expanded coverage across streaming, observability, and activation flows
- Refactored transport tests for clarity
- Broadened `messageConverter` and legacy migration coverage

---

## 📚 Documentation

- `README.md` and `README.marketplace.md` fully updated to reflect 2.1.0 configuration model
- `CHANGELOG.md` updated with full migration guide and breaking change details
- `AGENTS.md` updated to reflect `LegacyConfigMigration` module and remove stale pre-2.1.0 references

---
